info.title: DeerFlow API Gateway
info.description:
## DeerFlow API Gateway

API Gateway for DeerFlow - A LangGraph-based AI agent backend with sandbox execution capabilities.

### Features

- **Models Management**: Query and retrieve available AI models
- **MCP Configuration**: Manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations
- **Memory Management**: Access and manage global memory data for personalized conversations
- **Skills Management**: Query and manage skills and their enabled status
- **Artifacts**: Access thread artifacts and generated files
- **Health Monitoring**: System health check endpoints

### Architecture

LangGraph requests are handled by nginx reverse proxy.
This gateway provides custom endpoints for models, MCP configuration, skills, and artifacts.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all available AI models configured in the system.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific AI model by its name.
Retrieve the current Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations.

put.description: Update Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations and save to file.

get.description: Retrieve the current global memory data including user context, history, and facts.

delete.description: Delete all saved memory data and reset the memory structure to an empty state.

post.description: Reload memory data from the storage file, refreshing the in-memory cache.
Create a single saved memory fact manually.

delete.description: Delete a single saved memory fact by its fact id.

patch.description: Partially update a single saved memory fact by its fact id while preserving omitted fields.

get.description: Retrieve the current memory system configuration.
Retrieve both memory configuration and current data in a single request.
Retrieve a list of all available skills from both public and custom directories.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific skill by its name.

put.description: Update a skill's enabled status by modifying the extensions_config.json file.

post.description: Install a skill from a .skill file (ZIP archive) located in the thread's user-data directory.

get.description: Retrieve an artifact file generated by the AI agent. Text and binary files can be viewed inline, while active web content is always downloaded.

post.description: Upload multiple files to a thread's uploads directory.

get.description: List all files in a thread's uploads directory.

schema.title: Response List Uploaded Files Api Threads  Thread Id  Uploads List Get

delete.description: Delete a file from a thread's uploads directory.

schema.title: Response Delete Uploaded File Api Threads  Thread Id  Uploads  Filename  Delete

post.description:
Create a new thread for the current tenant.

The thread_id is auto-generated as a UUID.

get.description: List all threads for the current tenant.

schema.title: Response List Threads Api Threads Get

get.description: Get thread information for the current tenant.

delete.description:
Delete local persisted filesystem data for a thread.

This endpoint only cleans DeerFlow-managed thread directories. LangGraph
thread state deletion remains handled by the LangGraph API.

Only the owning tenant can delete their threads.

get.description: List all custom agents available in the agents directory.

post.description: Create a new custom agent with its config and SOUL.md.

get.description: Validate an agent name and check if it is available (case-insensitive).

schema.title: Response Check Agent Name Api Agents Check Get

get.description: Retrieve details and SOUL.md content for a specific custom agent.

put.description: Update an existing custom agent's config and/or SOUL.md.

delete.description: Delete a custom agent and all its files (config, SOUL.md, memory).

get.description: Read the global USER.md file that is injected into all custom agents.

put.description: Write the global USER.md file that is injected into all custom agents.

post.description: Generate short follow-up questions a user might ask next, based on recent conversation context.

get.description: Get the status of all IM channels.

post.description: Restart a specific IM channel.

get.description:
获取所有租户列表

Returns:
    TenantsResponse: 租户列表和总数

post.description:
创建新租户（仅限管理员）

Args:
    tenant: 租户创建请求

Returns:
    Tenant: 新建的租户信息

get.description:
获取当前活跃租户

Returns:
    Tenant: 当前租户信息

Raises:
    HTTPException: 当前租户不存在时

获取指定租户

Args:
    tenant_id: 租户ID

Returns:
    Tenant: 租户信息

Raises:
    HTTPException: 租户不存在时

put.description:
更新租户信息（仅限管理员）

Args:
    tenant_id: 租户ID
    tenant_update: 租户更新请求

Returns:
    Tenant: 更新后的租户信息

Raises:
    HTTPException: 租户不存在时

delete.description:
删除租户（仅限管理员）

Args:
    tenant_id: 租户ID

Raises:
    HTTPException: 租户不存在或为当前活跃租户时

post.description:
切换当前活跃租户

Args:
    tenant_id: 目标租户ID

Returns:
    Tenant: 新的当前租户信息

Raises:
    HTTPException: 租户不存在或状态非活跃时
